message:
fix(test): update conformance_doc_kinds for identity FTS cleanup + clippy lint

- Agent/Project search plans now correctly expect PlanMethod::Like (not
  Fts) since identity FTS tables are dropped at runtime by
  enforce_runtime_identity_fts_cleanup
- Fix uninlined_format_args clippy warning in tui_app.rs toast test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
